## Today (2026-05-14) — six-hour cohomological convergence

Across the small hours of 2026-05-14, the (I5) inductive-lift attack landed nine consecutive GREEN/AMBER verdicts on independent angles. Daniel directives shaped the trajectory:

### Mechanism (M1) — n-uniform constructive cofiber Morse (mg-6295 PCR-Lit-2)

For each inclusion ι_n: PPF_n ↪ PPF_{n+1}, M_{n+1} = M_n ⊔ M_rel is acyclic by the **n-independent downward-closed-subcomplex lemma**. M_rel is PERFECT on C_*(Δ_{n+1}, Δ_n) with critical vector (0,0,2,0) at n=3→4 (reproduces PCR-1 mg-f91f cofiber Betti); generates H̃²(Δ_4/Δ_3) ≅ 2·sgn_{S_3} (reproduces PCR-2 mg-59f3 m_{X/A}^sgn = 2). **The lemma is uniformly applicable at all n.**

### Mechanism (M2) — FI-module rep-stability with presentation degree 0 (mg-759d PCR-Lit-3)

H̃^{n-2}(Δ_n; ℚ) ≅ sgn_{S_n}, dim 1, at all n (verified n=3,4,5,6). The **sgn-twisted sequence (H̃^{n-2}(Δ_n) ⊗ sgn)_n is the constant FI-module M(0)** = (triv_{S_n})_n; finitely generated; presentation degree 0; character polynomial = constant 1; reproduces n=6 data.

Closes cohomological content of (I5) at all n **conditional on FI finite generation** (sharpened from F8'' §7.2 specialist ask).

Critical reframing produced by mg-759d: the bad-coface count (10 → 64 → ...) that F9 sessions were investigating is "a cochain-level, representative-dependent quantity, NOT an FI-module invariant; predicted super-polynomial but NOT an (I5) obstruction. The obstruction-relevant quantity is the cohomology, which is constant." This is what triggered Daniel's "focus on induction not n=7" directive and the F9-S2 STOP.

## Trajectory

**Compat-Geom arc has converged from "extensive scoping with (I5) Tier-3 gap" to "two independent general-n closure mechanisms in hand" in ~6 hours.** The Plan H S_n-equivariance unlock (mg-9e88) + the n-uniform cofiber Morse (mg-6295) + FI rep-stability presentation degree 0 (mg-759d) + ICOP per-step BFT-sharp 16/16 (mg-1e99 + mg-3bf3) constitute a publication-class proof sketch.

**Honest gap status.** Mechanism M2 (FI rep-stability) is conditional on FI finite generation. mg-759d verified presentation degree 0 empirically at n=3,4,5,6; the abstract finite-generation criterion is the load-bearing remaining hypothesis. F10 will close this via standard rep-stability machinery if achievable, or formulate the precise conditional statement otherwise.

**Sub-α-C arc** (parked): Order polytope + chamber decomp + Stanley vertex + continuous FKG/AD + chamber-restricted inner inequality + case3 narrowing + 4 mathlib-PR-class candidates. All preserved on side branch.
